required_preferences.fact: Delegates urgent inventory system issues to trusted deputies during migraine flare-ups, only steps in when screen time restriction is lifted

supersedes.fact: Always answers urgent inventory system issues personally before escalating to IT

required_preferences.fact: Uses his CPAP machine every night at home and relies on nightly CPAP data downloads for ongoing sleep quality monitoring — no longer tracks sleep via the clinic’s equipment or general monitoring apps

supersedes.fact: Relies on overnight sleep clinic results and prescribed monitoring equipment to assess sleep quality — discontinues nightly sleep tracking app usage temporarily

required_preferences.fact: Brings a notepad and digital tablet to every cross-department task force meeting at the corporate office — prefers hybrid note-taking for complex discussions
Texts his wife before leaving work every evening to coordinate dinner and pickups — never leaves it to last minute
Avoids all screens and troubleshooting duties during migraine episodes, shifts to paperwork or in-person coordination tasks only
Plans family video calls each week with his oldest child after their relocation — never lets two consecutive weeks pass without contact

persona: A 45-year-old operations supervisor at a logistics firm
